REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT RECEIVERSHIP SPECIALISTS, INC., KEVIN (RECEIVER) SINGER, ERVIN COHEN & JESSUP, LLP, BLAKE ALSBROOK DEFENDANTS NOTICE OF MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (ANTI-SLAPP) PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MAY 5, 2023, FOR THE COURT TO RULE ON THE MERITS. PLAINTIFF TO REFILE THE SAME OPPOSITION WHICH WAS PREVIOUSLY REJECTED BY APRIL 21, 2023. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT RECEIVERSHIP SPECIALISTS, INC., KEVIN (RECEIVER) SINGER, ERVIN COHEN & JESSUP, LLP, BLAKE ALSBROOK DEFENDANTS NOTICE OF MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (ANTI-SLAPP) PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. ON APRIL 19, 2023, THE COURT CONTINUED THIS MOTION TO MAY 5, 2023, GRANTING DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO CURE THE PREVIOUSLY REJECTED OPPOSITION FILINGS. DEFENDANT WAS INSTRUCTED TO FILE THE OPPOSITION BY APRIL 21, 2023. ON APRIL 27, 2023, SIX DAYS AFTER THE DEADLINE PROVIDED BY THE COURT, DEFENDANT FILED THE REQUESTED OPPOSITION PAPERS, WHICH WERE ONCE AGAIN REJECTED. THE ONLY FILING BEFORE THE COURT IS THE KIHAGI DECLARATION, FILED ON APRIL 7, 2023. DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION, WITHOUT A MEMORANDUM, WAS CONSIDERED. PLAINTIFF SHOWED THAT THE CAUSES OF ACTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT RECEIVER AROSE FROM PROTECTED SPEECH OR PETITIONING ACTIVITIES OF THE RECEIVERSHIP. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT RECEIVER WAS NOT PROTECTED BY QUASI-JUDICIAL IMMUNITY; PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON ANY CAUSES OF ACTION (CODE CIV. PROC., 425.16.) JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. TAUALA ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2023 Continued To Aug-23-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFENDANT RECEIVERSHIP SPECIALISTS, INC., KEVIN (RECEIVER) SINGER, ERVIN COHEN & JESSUP, LLP, BLAKE ALSBROOK DEFENDANTS NOTICE OF MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (ANTI-SLAPP) PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Karen Uchiyama (415)271-3364 of Law Offices of Karen Uchiyama appearing via Zoom for plaintiff Xelan Prop 1, LLC et al.
Blake Corby Alsbrook (310)273-6333 of Ervin Cohen & Jessup LLP appearing via Zoom for defendant Receivership Specialists, Inc. et al.

Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Special Motion to Strike (Anti-SLAPP) is is GRANTED. On April 19, 2023, the Court continued this motion to May 5, 2023, granting Defendant an opportunity to cure the previously rejected opposition filings. Defendant was instructed to file the opposition by April 21, 2023. On April 27, 2023, six days after the deadline provided by the Court, Defendant filed the requested opposition papers, which were once again rejected. The only filing before the Court is the Kihagi Declaration, filed on April 7, 2023. Defendant's declaration, without a memorandum, was considered. Plaintiff showed that the causes of actions against Defendant Receiver arose from protected speech or petitioning activities of the Receivership. Plaintiff failed to provide evidence that Defendant Receiver was not protected by quasi-judicial immunity; Plaintiff did not establish a probability of prevailing on any causes of action (Code Civ. Proc., 425.16.)

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Tauala ; Not Reported. (D501)

DEFENDANT RECEIVERSHIP SPECIALISTS, INC., KEVIN (RECEIVER) SINGER, ERVIN COHEN & JESSUP, LLP, BLAKE ALSBROOK DEFENDANTS NOTICE OF MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (ANTI-SLAPP) PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-05-2023 Continued To May-08-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RECEIVERSHIP SPECIALISTS, INC., KEVIN (RECEIVER) SINGER, ERVIN COHEN & JESSUP, LLP, BLAKE ALSBROOK DEFENDANTS NOTICE OF MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (ANTI-SLAPP) PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT

No appearances. This matter is CONTINUED to May 8, 2023, per the ex parte order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp) Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT RECEIVERSHIP SPECIALISTS, INC., KEVIN (RECEIVER) SINGER, ERVIN COHEN & JESSUP, LLP, BLAKE ALSBROOK Defendants Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp) Plaintiffs Complaint is CONTINUED to May 5, 2023, for the Court to rule on the merits. Plaintiff to refile the same opposition which was previously rejected by April 21, 2023. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
